meta.adOverlapFixNote: Removed 3 orders (#LSDE14158, #LSDE13582, #LSDE14075) that were double-counted -- they matched Jeffri's Google Ads utm_term rule and were also present in Sukirtha Organic. January 2026 only, per confirmed rule: ad-attributed orders belong to the ad owner, not Organic.
